title: wireframe-spec spec.json
description: Top-level extract output. Aggregates scene-by-scene HTML walk results plus the four optional sidecar blocks (design/specs/policy/tests) parsed from <wireframes_dir>/{design,specs,policy,tests}.md or <project-root>/{...}.md.

manifest.description: Relative path to the project-manifest.json that produced this spec.

generated.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp of when extract was run.

design.description: Parsed design.md sidecar. Drives `blueprint css`. Omitted when sidecar absent (extract emits no null).

specs.description: Parsed specs.md sidecar. Drives `blueprint api`, `blueprint hooks`, `blueprint stores`.

scene.description: Scene name (typically the HTML filename without extension).

source.description: Relative path to the source HTML file.

element_id.description: data-element-id from HTML; must satisfy manifest.grammar.element_id_regex.

component.description: data-component from HTML; should be in manifest.components.vocab.

tokens.description: CSS var names referenced by this element; should resolve via manifest.tokens.vars or manifest.tokens.aliases.

arch_kind.description: Arch-diagram primitive kind (lane, box, edge, label, header, nav, footer).

arch_target.description: For arch_kind=edge: the element_id of the edge's target node.
